payload.answer: The system architecture is defined with Brain DB as the authoritative memory store, Cognee as a semantic projection layer, and Slack as the primary intake agent. Telegram integration and cost-performance optimization remain open design considerations.

entity_resolution.reason: No pre-existing entities match the described system roles or open questions.

relationships.object: the source of truth for durable memory
relationships.subject: Brain DB

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB is the authoritative source of truth for all durable memory storage.

relationships.object: rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB
relationships.subject: Cognee

memory_cards.statement: Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB, designed for query flexibility and interpretability.

relationships.object: user interactions to Brain DB via validation
relationships.subject: Slack

memory_cards.statement: Slack is a strict memory intake agent, responsible for ingesting and validating user interactions before durable storage in Brain DB.

relationships.object: as a parallel intake channel to Slack
relationships.subject: Telegram

memory_cards.statement: Telegram integration is under consideration for future expansion as a secondary intake channel.
Cost-performance optimization is required for model selection, prioritizing saturation of system capabilities without unnecessary expenditure.

details: Durable memory committed for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack roles.
Open questions logged for Telegram and model optimization.
No conflicts detected in existing memory.
